revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十八]][[zh:七月十八]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 18|qq=July 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|en|745|qid=Q23612|lt=745|1=745}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – The Sui dynasty envoy, {{ill|Yang Taizhen|ja|楊太真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Taizhen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, became a consort of Emperor {{ill|Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11572271}} of the Tang dynasty, making her the famous {{ill|Yang Guifei|en|Yang Guifei|qid=Q298046|lt=Yang Guifei|1=Yang Guifei}}. * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|qid=Q1145723|lt=Kangen|1=Kan'en}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1244|en|1244|qid=Q5439|lt=1244|1=1244}} {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}}) – In Echizen, Dōgen began construction of a great temple; this would later evolve into {{ill|Eihei-ji|en|Eihei-ji|qid=Q1303633|lt=Eihei-ji|1=Eihei-ji}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}) – In the Battle of Uji, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} attacked Uji and [[Makishima Castle]] in Bitchū, forcing {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|en|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qid=Q434415|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki}} to surrender and be exiled, effectively signaling the end of the Ashikaga Shogunate. * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}}) – In Edo, the gangster leader {{ill|Banzuiin Chōbē|en|Banzuiin Chōbē|qid=Q4857401|lt=Hatadain Chōhei|1=Banzuiin Chōbē}} was killed by the hatamoto {{ill|Mizuno Naruyuki|ja|水野成之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Naruyuki|1=Mizuno Nariyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10565638}}. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|qid=Q7602|lt=1669|1=1669}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}}) – The battle known as the 【Shakusha-in no Tatakai】 took place, as various Ainu tribes rose in revolt in response to a call by their chieftain. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}}) – The Russian envoy, Puchachin, led four warships from the Russian Far Eastern fleet to Nagasaki. After being rejected by the bakufu, they departed. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|August 26|en|August 26|qid=Q2820|lt=August 26|1=August 26}}) – The signing of the 【Anglo-Japanese Treaty of Amity and Commerce】 took place. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}}) – Within the premises of Yushima Seidō, the Ministry of Education was established.
== Births == * {{ill|Chōgen|en|Chōgen|qid=Q1193557|lt=Chōgen|1=Chōgen}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1034|en|1034|qid=Q19324|lt=1034|1=1034}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|qid=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, the 71st Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1073|en|1073|qid=Q19437|lt=1073|1=1073}}). * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|qid=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō|1=Shōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|qid=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|qid=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}}) – {{ill|Tsugaru Nobumasa|en|Tsugaru Nobumasa|qid=Q7849976|lt=Tsugaru Nobumasa|1=Tsugaru Nobumasa}}, lord of the Hirosaki Domain (died {{ill|1710|en|1710|qid=Q6861|lt=1710|1=1710}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}}) – {{ill|Naitō Konan|en|Naitō Konan|qid=Q3138959|lt=Naitō Konan|1=Naitō Konan}}, an Oriental historian (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|qid=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}}) – {{ill|Terasaki Kogyo|en|Terasaki Kogyo|qid=Q11457861|lt=Tegata Sadako|1=Terasaki Kogyo}}’s wife, a noted actress (died {{ill|1946|en|1946|qid=Q18610|lt=1946|1=1946}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|qid=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō|1=Shōhō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1075|en|1075|qid=Q19439|lt=1075|1=1075}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|en|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|qid=Q3082851|lt=Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|1=Minamoto no Yoriyoshi}}, a military commander (born {{ill|988|en|988|qid=Q23475|lt=988|1=988}}). * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1204|en|1204|qid=Q5228|lt=1204|1=1204}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|qid=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie|1=Minamoto no Yoriie}}, the 2nd shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1182|en|1182|qid=Q19708|lt=1182|1=1182}}). * {{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|qid=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1315|en|1315|qid=Q5742|lt=1315|1=1315}} {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Hirotoki|en|Hōjō Hirotoki|qid=Q2331538|lt=Hōjō Tsunetoki|1=Hōjō Hirotoki}}, the 12th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1279|en|1279|qid=Q5534|lt=1279|1=1279}}). * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}}) – The Edo gangster leader {{ill|Banzuiin Chōbē|en|Banzuiin Chōbē|qid=Q4857401|lt=Hatadain Chōhei|1=Banzuiin Chōbē}} was killed (born {{ill|1622|en|1622|qid=Q6815|lt=1622|1=1622}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|August 26|en|August 26|qid=Q2820|lt=August 26|1=August 26}}) – {{ill|Ichigawa Miai-an|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichigawa Miai-an|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher (born {{ill|1779|en|1779|qid=Q7714|lt=1779|1=1779}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|17|7|19|6|18|8|7|0718|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
